_comment: v1 pixel -> v3w pixel maps (both full-res). From simultaneous moon sightings; see bin/fit-v1-v3w. TWO models: affine (tight on the moon arc, tilts at corners) and fov_box (published-FOV scale, no rotation, 1 anchor — for the v1 FOV perimeter box). moon-overlay --v1-fov uses fov_box.

fov_box._comment: q = scale*p + translate, no rotation. scale from published horizontal FOV (v1 53.5deg, v3w 102deg).
